task_title: ADR-0020 Gate 0 — controlled PCC-vs-direct usage proof (corrected main)

prior_art.source: Claude Code prompt-cache docs + captured session JSONL (docs/incidents/2026-07-usage-blowup.md)
prior_art.finding: Cache is content-addressed with a 1-hour ephemeral TTL; a cold --resume can cache_read within the TTL. This is exactly the crux Gate 0 measures — the cold-rebuild hypothesis is not yet proven, so the run must vary the inter-message gap across the TTL boundary.

prior_art.source: ADR-0020 Step 2 diagnostic (RETRACTED) + the shell:true argv-mangling fix (main 148dbf8)
prior_art.finding: The prior cold-vs-warm diagnostic was invalid because the cold arm never received its prompts. Gate 0 must run from the corrected main where measure-usage sends prompts over stdin and both arms are byte-equivalent.

prior_art.source: existing PCC tools: measure-usage.js (cold), measure-direct.js (warm), reconstruct-incident.js
prior_art.finding: The measurement harness already exists and was corrected; reuse it as-is, do not build new measurement tooling.

reuse_decision.rationale: Gate 0 is a measurement run over the existing, now-corrected measure-usage.js / measure-direct.js tools. No new tooling; the protocol is frozen in docs/specs/gate-0-usage-proof.md.

deterministic_work: reading raw session JSONL telemetry (cache_creation/read, num_turns) — ground truth, not a model call
comparing against the locked PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE thresholds
llm_work: the measured turns themselves ARE the plan-usage spend being measured (unavoidable — that is the experiment)
one real large-context paired run for the Stage 2 sanity check
duplication_avoidance: Reuses the corrected measurement tools and the frozen protocol; no re-implementation. Stage 1 result gates Stage 2 so usage is not spent reconfirming a failure.

usage_plan.baseline: direct/warm arm (measure-direct.js) on byte-identical tasks — the matched comparison
usage_plan.max_authorized_usage: Stage 1: <5% of a 5-hour limit; Stage 2: one full-size paired run (owner-approved middle option). Hard stop if Stage 1 clearly FAILS.
stopping_conditions: Stage 1 clearly FAILS or shows pathological escalation -> STOP, do not run Stage 2
any run with missing/unparseable telemetry -> INVALID, excluded
Stage 2 driver cannot be proven == context -> INVALID
usage_plan.matched_benchmark_reason: Gate 0 exists to compare PCC's cold-per-message path against equivalent direct Claude work; a matched direct-vs-PCC token/session benchmark is the entire point.
usage_plan.completion_evidence: every raw valid run + PCC/direct steady-state ratios + gap schedule + rollover behaviour + invalid runs + PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict + operational boundary

not_proven: This preflight is authored as the FIRST consumer of the enforcement mechanism. Gate 0 itself remains HALTED and is not run until separately authorized from the corrected main.
